title: Opinion: Opinion | Pakistan's Dangerous Dance With America Is Finally Starting To Haunt It
summary_full: A fanatical opposition to Israel has been assiduously cultivated by successive regimes in Pakistan, so much so that anti-Semitism has been normalised. A U-turn could cause massive unrest.
